note: Hand-curated starter corpus of short, realistic workplace-chat snippets (status updates, meeting acks, quick questions, @mentions). v1.1 ships these as hand-written lines, NOT LLM-synthesized; LLM synthesis of the Teams corpus is a separate decision deferred past v1.1. See data/PROVENANCE.md.
items: Morning all, starting on the deploy now, will update here when it's live.

Heads up: CI is red on main, looks like a flaky test, looking into it.

Quick question: are we still targeting Friday for the release?

Great work everyone on hitting the sprint goal this week!

The new dashboard is live, let me know if anything looks off.

Looks good to me, approved. Feel free to merge once CI is green.

Moving this thread to the dev channel to keep things organized.
Quick reminder that the office is closed Monday for the holiday.
I'll have the estimates ready before our planning meeting tomorrow.

Nice, the latency dropped by 40% after the index change.
Heads up, rolling back the last deploy, something's off with sessions.
